headline: A Wrong Number Text Sparked an Unlikely Friendship Across Generations
summary: Kendrick Constant (29) meant to text his financial advisor but messaged Brent Milner (57) instead. Instead of ignoring it, Brent answered with humor. The two kept texting, discovered shared interests, and became genuine friends despite never having met in person.
keywords: wrong number friendship, intergenerational friendship, social connection, kindness of strangers, unexpected friendship
